arts.ttl: Liverpool player’s agents insist he’s not moving – January exit ruled out for now
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa will be staying at Liverpool this month, with his agents insisting a transfer is not on the cards. That’s according to journalist Gianluca Vitale, who reports that Chiesa is ‘increasingly towards permanence’ at Liverpool. He states that Chiesa’s entourage are insisting that the forward will not be on the move this month. arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly ahead of fellow Premier League side Newcastle United in the race to sign a La Liga centre-back who is valued at around £20m.

arts.ttl: Klopp hopes 'fantastic' Salah stays at Liverpool
arts.sum: Former Liverpool manager Jürgen Klopp has said he hopes Mohamed Salah stays at the club, labelling him the best striker they have had in modern times.
